item.title: My relationship ended and I can’t afford basic living, but hey, here’s some memes and a story…
item.description:
The day before I ended my relationship I had to attend a course for work
After the course I decided to go for a walk
Ironically, the course was about mental health, of which I have none
So I went across the road to the largest and oldest cemetery in my city
It’s big enough to have audio tours and roads
I always find peace in graveyards, especially old ones
About 4 rows in, I see something in a corner
It’s the oldest part of the cemetery, and I’d say the least visited
Bending down, right by the wall, in between a headstone and the bricks, I find a shoulder bag
I look around. There’s no one here. Only me and the magpies
Inside the bag I find nothing at first
A vape, a comb, two glasses cloths…
And a purse
I open the purse to see if there’s an ID
There is… an expired drivers licence
And keys to a house
She lives nearby, but not near enough to walk (I had no car with me)
And there’s two Medicare cards
And a debit card, and a credit card, and a bus pass
And just over $700 cash
I pause
I find myself at a moral crossroads
I’m very poor right now
I can barely keep myself out of the negatives
$700 would literally save my ass
I put the stuff back in the bag and look up, questioning what kind of person I am at heart
When even in my darkest hole, faced with pure, easy temptation… what do I do? Who am I at my core?
I see a car at the exit of the graveyard so I knock on the window
It’s a middle aged woman
I explain my situation and ask her where the nearest police station is
It’s almost 4km away, so she offers to drive me
As a young woman myself, getting in a stranger’s car goes against everything I’ve been taught
But she felt safe
She drove me across the city and I told her what was in the bag and about my thoughts
I was hoping she’d tell me it’s okay to keep $100 or $50 and give the rest
But she doesn’t, and I don’t push
I give everything to the police and sign all the forms
If it’s not claimed in 3 months I can have all the cash back
In the end I said to myself…
You’re a teacher. You shape young minds. What would you want your students to do? Who do you want them to be? They learn their morals and seek guidance from you. Be their beacon.
Still, I really could have done with that $700
And no one would have known it was me who took it; after all, I was the Good Samaritan who returned the rest and didn’t empty her bank accounts or rob her house
My therapist says it’s normal what I felt, that even the strongest of moral compasses sometimes strays from north
But having ruminated on it, I don’t know what that $700 cash was for?
If I had taken it and returned the rest, maybe she wouldn’t have been able to feed her kids or afford her medication?
I guess life is full of crossroad moments, and I’m not telling you this to congratulate me or to seek pity
I just want you to remember to take the road that will make you feel lighter in the long run, not just in the now
In the end, if everyone did what you did, would the world be better, safer, and stronger overall?
item.dc:creator: JoleneJoleneJoleneJoleeene

item.title: The days drag on, but the years fly by.
item.description:
You are my sunshine, my only sunshine.
You make me happy, when skies are grey.
You’ll never know dear, how much I love you.
Please don’t take
My sunshine
Away.

item.title: Lunchables made specifically for schools had 37% more sodium as well as traces of lead, cadmium, and phthalate or phthalate replacement chemicals
item.description: This was after Kraft Heinz re-formulated the ingredients to ensure the products met federal guidelines. Kraft Heinz said both options were made using “a specialized recipe that incorporates more protein and whole grains to keep kids powered throughout the day, reduced saturated fat and sodium, and an increased serving size.” The Lunchables pizza variety for schools (with 700 mg of sodium) compared to 510 mg in the store version. The USDA standards would reduce sodium limits gradually over several school years. According to ingredients listed on the Kraft-Heinz “Away from Home” website, CNN found the turkey and cheese Lunchables contains tertiary-butyl hydroquinone (TBHQ), a petroleum-based chemical found in pesticides. https://www.cnn.com/2024/04/09/business/lunchables-for-school-high-sodium-consumer-reports-wellness/index.html
item.dc:creator: MenloPart

item.title: I stole this dump, so you don't have. Tuesday meme dump
item.description:
1. Now everybody sing it with him
2. When you're a dad but ball is life
3
4. Task failed successfully
5. Or an Influencer....
6. Big cat can't get enough of this swing
7
8. Man, I'm tired of idiots
9. Tired of idiots: the sequel
10. I mean he is not wrong about the last part. Star Wars has been a creativly bankrupt disaster.
11. Meh, I would still turn left
12. True
13. Australian police vs drunk person
14. It should be illegal to be this cute
15. And finally I would like to share something from myself. I've been working very hard on Stanley Parable-like game with a touch of GladOS from Portal. The demo is out now and it made to TOP 10 on Steam's demo trending tab! And it features witty signs like this one here. "What?", I hear you ask. "I can read funny signs for free?" YES, yes you can! Try it now on Steam and please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ Thank you, and if this dump made you smile at least once, I am happy with it! : )

item.title: Full grown bottom shelf memes
item.description:
Oof. Rip pixels. "Why is this double wide? You don't have a girlfriend."
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Saturdays & Sundays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Tuesdays - Thursdays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Follow our channel to be notified next time me, Frothy, and our favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community go live!
Still unsure about joining the Bottom Shelf Community server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf Join for the games! Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tax channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the meme challenges! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
@TinyOctopus tried it once. He hasn't been the same since.
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: My Thirtyfourth Dump
item.description:
Today's bait image is not a pretty lady, and not exactly a pretty car, but I hope it upsets and infuriates you all the same.
Guys.
It happened.
Today we have reached the end of the journey.
There are no more images left in the imgur download folder on my phone.
What a ride it's been.
So now there will no longer be daily dumps. You will have to look to the east, on the dawn of the fifth day (starting 5 days before I have another 50 images collected), for my return.
You know, back in one of my very early dumps, I said that I wasn't sure I could trust you guys to travel on this Lean Mean Meme Teme Macheme with me. But you know what? Some of you are all right, I think.
So anyway. LET'S GOOOOOO!!!
This incredible gif was actually left as a comment on one of my earlier dumps, and it is magnificent.
I am sorry I am sorry I am sorry I am sorry I am sorry.
We are not going out without frogs, guys.
Never thought I would miss Eerie Red Eyes.
I wonder if this dump will get auto-marked as mature as well. 'Twould be fitting.
KANE LIVES!!
This too is from the comments of one of my earlier dumps that had a piece of Mordin appreciation art in it.
I really enjoyed reading all the comments and engagements!
Getting addicted to that little arrow pop-up on my phone's lock screen when y'all leave comments'n'shit.
Frog!
Frog! <3
Oh look, it me.
Helldivers 2 meme! I am learning to enjoy that game. Slowly.
The Meme Teme Macheme coming to a halt is signified by these last images being from yesterday's front page.
item.dc:creator: Kateness
